ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "formulation" TEXT /* Formulation of the drug (e.g., tablet, capsule, injection) */,
  "indication" TEXT /* Indication for which the drug is prescribed */,
  "warning" TEXT /* Warning or caution associated with the drug */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the drug manufacturer */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the drug was approved by regulatory authorities */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the drug information was last updated */,
  "clinical_trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial (foreign key to the clinical_trials table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drugs_clinical_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinical_trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug being reviewed */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition being treated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the drug (1-10) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "dosage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dosage used */,
  "side_effect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the side effect experienced */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of any drug interaction experienced */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Whether the review is anonymous */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user submitting the review (for audit purposes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_side_effect_id FOREIGN KEY ("side_effect_id") REFERENCES side_effects ("side_effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_dosage_id FOREIGN KEY ("dosage_id") REFERENCES dosages ("dosage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, moderator, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the review (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "useful_counts" (
  "useful_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each useful count */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being counted */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been marked as useful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("useful_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_useful_counts_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dosages" (
  "dosage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dosage */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug being dosed */,
  "dosage" REAL /* Dosage amount */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the dosage (e.g., mg, ml) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the dosage (e.g., once daily, twice daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dosage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dosages_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "side_effects" (
  "side_effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each side effect */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug associated with the side effect */,
  "side_effect" TEXT /* Description of the side effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("side_effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_side_effects_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "drug_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first drug involved in the interaction */,
  "drug_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second drug involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_drug_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id1") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_drug_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id2") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contraindications" (
  "contraindication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contraindication */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug associated with the contraindication */,
  "contraindication" TEXT /* Description of the contraindication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contraindication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contraindications_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pregnancy_categories" (
  "pregnancy_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pregnancy category */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug associated with the pregnancy category */,
  "pregnancy_category" TEXT /* Description of the pregnancy category (e.g., A, B, C, D, X) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pregnancy_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pregnancy_categories_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warnings" (
  "warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warning */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug associated with the warning */,
  "warning" TEXT /* Description of the warning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warnings_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indications" (
  "indication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indication */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug associated with the indication */,
  "indication" TEXT /* Description of the indication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indications_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug being tested */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the trial results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data entry */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., FDA, NIH) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., adverse event, clinical trial) */,
  "data_details" TEXT /* Details of the data */,
  "date_retrieved" TEXT /* Date when the data was retrieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)
